name: modern-news-app-root
description: Root configuration to concurrently orchestrate Spring Boot, Node.js API Gateway, and React Vite Front-End

scripts.frontend: cd frontend && ( [ -d node_modules ] || npm install ) && npm run dev
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n "SPRING,NODE_GATEWAY,VITE_UI" -c "green,blue,magenta" "npm run backend:spring" "npm run backend:node" "npm run frontend"
